events.title: Sprint 1 Planning
events.description: Kick-off sprint planning for FireGlass project. Repository setup, tech stack review, Sprint 1 goals.

events.title: Client Onboarding Call
events.description: Initial call with Innovative Windows LLC. Project scope, requirements, timeline confirmation.

events.title: Weekly Internal Standup
events.description: Sprint 1 mid-week sync. Auth scaffolding progress, repository setup status.

events.title: Sprint 1 Review & Demo
events.description: Sprint 1 demo: Repository setup, authentication module scaffold, initial dashboard shell.

events.title: Sprint 1 Retrospective
events.description: Sprint 1 retro. Fast ramp-up, smooth collaboration, eager to tackle CRUD next sprint.

events.title: Sprint 2 Planning
events.description: Sprint 2 planning. CRUD operations, dashboard components, integration prep.

events.title: Prisma Schema Freeze Deadline
events.description: Final Prisma schema committed. No further DB schema changes until Sprint 5.

events.title: Client Bi-Weekly Check-In
events.description: Progress review. CRUD development on track, dashboard scaffolding complete.

events.title: Helion Technical Call
events.description: Scheduled call with Helion sensor vendor for firmware documentation.

events.title: Sprint 2 Review & Demo
events.description: Sprint 2 demo: Full CRUD for sensors, dashboard shell, integration scaffold.

events.title: Sprint 2 Retrospective
events.description: Sprint 2 retro. Velocity: 22/24 story points. Good momentum.

events.title: Helion Technical Call (Rescheduled)
events.description: Rescheduled Helion call for firmware documentation.

events.title: Sprint 3 Planning
events.description: Sprint 3 planning. Sensor integration, MQTT setup, IoT module architecture.

events.title: Client Bi-Weekly Check-In
events.description: Mid-project status. CRUD complete, sensor integration starting.

events.title: Design Review with Alberto
events.description: Design review of dashboard UX, sensor readout display, alert formatting.

events.title: Sprint 3 Review & Demo
events.description: Sprint 3 demo: MQTT integration attempt, Helion integration scaffold. Blockers identified.

events.title: Sprint 3 Retrospective
events.description: Sprint 3 retro. Velocity drop: 14/26 story points. Helion firmware docs unavailable. MQTT blockers.

events.title: Sprint 4 Planning
events.description: Sprint 4 planning. MQTT workarounds, offline mode research, payload reverse-engineering.

events.title: Client Bi-Weekly Check-In
events.description: Status update. Pivot to reverse-engineering MQTT payloads. Field testing prep for Milan.

events.title: Field Testing - Milan Site Visit
events.description: First Milan site visit. Hardware inspection, sensor placement planning, network assessment.

events.title: Field Testing - Milan Site Visit (Day 2)
events.description: Sensor installation, network setup, initial payload capture for reverse-engineering.

events.title: Field Testing - Milan Site Visit (Day 3)
events.description: System validation, payload testing, on-site troubleshooting.

events.title: Sprint 4 Review & Demo
events.description: Sprint 4 demo: MQTT workarounds, offline mode MVP, reverse-engineered payload parser.

events.title: Sprint 4 Retrospective
events.description: Sprint 4 retro. Velocity recovery: 16/20 story points. Reverse-engineering strategy validated.

events.title: Sprint 5 Planning
events.description: Sprint 5 planning. Sensor dashboard, field testing expansion, data deduplication.

events.title: Field Testing - Milan Follow-up
events.description: Second Milan visit. System integration validation, performance testing.

events.title: Field Testing - Milan Follow-up (Day 2)
events.description: Continued integration testing, dashboard review with facility managers.

events.title: Field Testing - Milan Follow-up (Day 3)
events.description: Final testing, data validation, site sign-off.

events.title: Client Bi-Weekly Check-In
events.description: Field testing results, sensor dashboard demo, MVP timeline confirmation.

events.title: Field Testing - Verona Site Visit
events.description: Verona facility installation and initial testing.

events.title: Field Testing - Verona Site Visit (Day 2)
events.description: Verona system validation, integration testing.

events.title: Sprint 5 Review & Demo
events.description: Sprint 5 demo: Sensor dashboard, field-tested payloads, deduplication fix.

events.title: Sprint 5 Retrospective
events.description: Sprint 5 retro. Velocity: 20/22 story points. Field testing validated architecture.

events.title: Sprint 6 Planning
events.description: Sprint 6 planning. Compliance reports, PDF generation, CASL compliance setup.

events.title: Client Bi-Weekly Check-In
events.description: MVP feature review, compliance requirements, UAT preparation.

events.title: Sprint 6 Review & Demo
events.description: Sprint 6 demo: Compliance reports, PDF generation, CASL implementation.

events.title: Sprint 7 Planning
events.description: Sprint 7 planning. MVP polish, CASL refactor, load testing, documentation.

events.title: Client Bi-Weekly Check-In
events.description: Near-final review, UAT scheduling, launch checklist.

events.title: Team Dinner
events.description: Team celebration dinner during final sprint push.

events.title: Sprint 7 Review & Demo
events.description: Sprint 7 demo: MVP polish complete, load testing results, CASL refactor.

events.title: Sprint 8 Planning
events.description: Sprint 8 final planning. UAT execution, bug fixes, launch prep, handover.

events.title: UAT Start Deadline
events.description: User acceptance testing begins with client team.

events.title: Client Bi-Weekly Check-In
events.description: UAT progress review, bug triage, launch timeline.

events.title: Sprint 8 Review & Demo
events.description: Sprint 8 final demo: UAT complete, launch-ready system, handover documentation.

events.title: Project Handover & Closure
events.description: Final handover meeting. System deployed, documentation complete, knowledge transfer.
